title: Edit ProjectHeader and PhaseList components and commit changes
job:
Edit two files:

1. plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/ProjectHeader.tsx:
   Read the file. Add a useEffect that resyncs local state when the project prop changes:
   useEffect(() => { setName(project.name); setObjective(project.objective); setStatus(project.status); }, [project.id, project.updatedAt]);

2. plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/PhaseList.tsx:
   Read the file. When displaying phase numbers, use (index + 1) instead of p.phaseNumber so the display always matches the visual sort order.

Commit both files.
